prompt.text:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:AI 采购工作流。参考原型(OSS 模板):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/82-ai-procurement-workflow.html

[环境] NocoBase env `fable14232`(nb CLI 已配)。所有写操作一律 `nb api <...> -e fable14232 -y`(始终显式 -e,带 -y)。
**先把 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 读完(SKILL.md + references/ 全部:spec-template / block-recipes / gotchas / visual-loop)再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/枚举/页面/招牌区块)——先 curl 抓原型读这个 spec,它是唯一事实源,严格照建。集合前缀统一用 `ai82_`(本实例里多个原型共存,前缀务必隔离)。
端到端**完整**搭:数据建模一次过 + 英文种子(覆盖每个枚举/状态各 ≥1 行,密度足够)+ 每个集合的列表页(Filter+Add+Table+View 抽屉,子表用 associationName+sourceId 自动按父过滤)+ 招牌视图/看板(按 region→原生块 映射,别清一色表格)。
[视觉自查] Playwright 全新无缓存浏览器打开 `/admin/<pageUid>`;token 按 skill 的 visual-loop 注入 localStorage NOCOBASE_TOKEN(env `fable14232` 的 token 可从 nb 配置/登录取;appslib 可 UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / ***REDACTED***)。截图 ↔ 原型对照,对齐 **≥8 成**才算完成;招牌区块为空/报错绝不算完成。框住招牌主体,别出现大片白屏。
全程自主多轮推进,不要停下来问我。
最后报告:① collection 清单 ② 招牌页 pageUid ③ 必须写明一行 `Self-Score: X/10` ④ 与原型的对比观察 ⑤ 踩的坑。
prompt.launchInstruction: First read the nocobase-prototype-repro skill (SKILL.md + references/). Then read ~/prj/vscodes/app-library-bench/tooling/bench/prompts/round-61-90/p82.prompt.txt as the user requirement and reproduce it END-TO-END in the NocoBase env 'fable14232' via the nb CLI (ALWAYS pass -e fable14232): SPEC -> data modeling in ONE pass -> all-English seed (every enum) -> list pages (Filter+Add+Table+View drawer+sub-tables) -> refine signature regions -> screenshot self-check >=80%. Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.

outcome.finalText:
Everything is built, verified, and documented. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — p82 "AI Procurement Workflow" (Procura AI) on `fable14232`

Reproduced end-to-end from the local prototype (`web/82-ai-procurement-workflow.html` — the OSS URL 404s and the file has **no** embedded `nb-spec`, so I analyzed its `DOCS[]`/`FEED[]` arrays directly). Light theme, rose accent `#db2777`. All writes used `-e fable14232 -y`.

### ① Collections (6, prefix `ai82_`)
| Collection | Rows | Key fields (enums) |
|---|---|---|
| `ai82_vendors` | 8 | name·initials·color·category·**tier**[Tier-1/2/3]·cycle_spend |
| `ai82_documents` (main, titleField=doc_no) | 14 | doc_no·po_number·amount·confidence·score·reason · m2o **vendor** · o2m lineItems/extractedFields/checks · **doc_type**[Invoice,Quote] · **status**[flagged,review,auto,routing] · **category**[8] · **terms**[Net 15/30/45/60] · **recommendation**[HOLD,REVIEW,AUTO,ROUTE_APPROVER,ROUTE_DUAL] |
| `ai82_line_items` | 34 | description·qty·unit_price·line_total |
| `ai82_extracted_fields` | 84 | label·field_value·confidence·**is_low** |
| `ai82_checks` | 56 | title·detail·**check_status**[ok,warn,fail] |
| `ai82_activities` | 6 | text·occurred_at·**kind**[ai,ok,warn,flag] |

Seed is all-English, covers **every enum branch** (status dist `flagged 2 / review 3 / auto 7 / routing 2` matches the prototype donut exactly), and is dense (≥2 children per parent).

### ② Signature page
- **Intake Queue dashboard — pageSchemaUid `umtcipxo5k3`** (menu group "AI Procurement").
- Regions, all *native container + JS content* (never one big JS block): KPI strip JSBlock `h8b4pukgcp7`; Incoming-Documents **List** `90owgx5w52x` + JSField card `ud1h2eu4dug` + status pills **JSItemAction** `fm6qyswaqlj`; AI-Assist composer JSBlock `88cgkm99l1z`; AI-Activity **List** `79jtpckq6rw` + JSField `8fggwclmle3`; Queue-by-Status donut JSBlock `mfz6wb8bcqd`; Top-Vendors bars JSBlock `xwwct4h0g97`. Card click → `openView('bczv6qvz3l7')` (reuses the Doc

transcript.cmd: {"skill": "nocobase-prototype-repro"}

transcript.text:
Base directory for this skill: ~/.claude/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro

# Goal

Turn a prototype + a one-line ask into a faithful NocoBase app. This is a **meta / orchestration skill** — it sequences `nocobase-data-modeling` + `nocobase-ui-builder` + `nocobase-app-discipline` and adds the two things that decide fidelity: a **region → native-block mapping** and a **visual convergence loop**. It does not re-teach the CLI; it routes to the sibling skills for mechanics and owns only the reproduction-specific judgment.

# When to use / Non-Goals

**Hard gate (check before selecting this skill):** there must be an actual prototype in hand — an HTML file, a screenshot, or a link to one — that you are matching against. No prototype, no fidelity gap → this is **not** the skill; a plain "build me an app / a page" request belongs to `nocobase-app-discipline` (whole system) or `nocobase-ui-builder` (single page/edit). Do not let this skill shadow the normal build flow.

**Use when:**
- The user gives a prototype (HTML file, link, screenshot, or a `public/prototypes/...` URL to curl) and wants it reproduced in NocoBase.
- A page already exists but the user says it's monotone / ugly / doesn't match the prototype / a region should be a list/card/kanban instead of a table — i.e. there is a **visual target and a fidelity gap**.

**Non-Goals — hand off, do not do here:**
- Pure data modeling (collections/fields/relations with no visual target) → `nocobase-data-modeling`.
- Workflows / automations → `nocobase-workflow-manage`. ACL / permissions → `nocobase-acl-manage`. Plugin work → `nocobase-plugin-development`.
- A localized UI edit with **no visual target and no fidelity gap** (move one field, rename an action, tweak a reaction) → `nocobase-ui-builder` **directly**. This skill is only worth its overhead when you are matching a prototype's look/behavior; for a mechanical surface edit, skip straight to ui-builder.
- Whole-page authoring from a business sentence with **no** prototype → author a quick prototype first ([prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md)), then this skill; or if the user just wants a generic page, that's `nocobase-ui-builder`'s `applyBlueprint`.

# Router — task shape → read first

Hit one route, read its "first" doc, and only open the "then" docs when that route is still not enough. Sibling skills own the mechanics; the reference files here own the reproduction-specific judgment.

| Task shape | Read first | Then, as needed |
|---|---|---|
| Prototype handed over → reproduce end-to-end | [spec-template.md](references/spec-template.md) (Phase 1 SPEC) | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md), [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) |
| Existing page is monotone / ugly / off | [visual-loop.md](references/visual-loop.md) | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md), [gotchas.md](references/gotchas.md) |
| "Which block for this region?" | the **Region → native block** table below | [decomposition-grammar.md](references/decomposition-grammar.md), [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Need a **JS body** for a widget (KPI card, donut, leaderboard, due-soon alert, progress bar, trend, facet filter, card grid, …) | [template-library/_index.md](references/template-library/_index.md) — 57 copy-pastable widget bodies, each with its `$p` input contract | [block-recipes.md](references/block-recipes.md) |
| Build/edit JS, flow-surfaces, popup, chart **mechanics** + runnable CLI | `nocobase-ui-builder` (its `js.md` / `popup.md` / `chart.md` / `runjs-*` / `page-archetypes.md`) | — |
| Collections / fields / relations | `nocobase-data-modeling` | — |
| Scope discipline, seed standards, naming, final report | `nocobase-app-discipline` | — |
| No prototype given, must author one | [prototype-authoring.md](references/prototype-authoring.md) | — |
| Hand the build to another agent fro

Everything is built, verified, and documented. Here is the final report.

---

# FINAL REPORT — p82 "AI Procurement Workflow" (Procura AI) on `fable14232`

Reproduced end-to-end from the local prototype (`web/82-ai-procurement-workflow.html` — the OSS URL 404s and the file has **no** embedded `nb-spec`, so I analyzed its `DOCS[]`/`FEED[]` arrays directly). Light theme, rose accent `#db2777`. All writes used `-e fable14232 -y`.

### ① Collections (6, prefix `ai82_`)
| Collection | Rows | Key fields (enums) |
|---|---|---|
| `ai82_vendors` | 8 | name·initials·color·category·**tier**[Tier-1/2/3]·cycle_spend |
| `ai82_documents` (main, titleField=doc_no) | 14 | doc_no·po_number·amount·confidence·score·reason · m2o **vendor** · o2m lineItems/extractedFields/checks · **doc_type**[Invoice,Quote] · **status**[flagged,review,auto,routing] · **category**[8] · **terms**[Net 15/30/45/60] · **recommendation**[HOLD,REVIEW,AUTO,ROUTE_APPROVER,ROUTE_DUAL] |
| `ai82_line_items` | 34 | description·qty·unit_price·line_total |
| `ai82_extracted_fields` | 84 | label·field_value·confidence·**is_low** |
| `ai82_checks` | 56 | title·detail·**check_status**[ok,warn,fail] |
| `ai82_activities` | 6 | text·occurred_at·**kind**[ai,ok,warn,flag] |

Seed is all-English, covers **every enum branch** (status dist `flagged 2 / review 3 / auto 7 / routing 2` matches the prototype donut exactly), and is dense (≥2 children per parent).

### ② Signature page
- **Intake Queue dashboard — pageSchemaUid `umtcipxo5k3`** (menu group "AI Procurement").
- Regions, all *native container + JS content* (never one big JS block): KPI strip JSBlock `h8b4pukgcp7`; Incoming-Documents **List** `90owgx5w52x` + JSField card `ud1h2eu4dug` + status pills **JSItemAction** `fm6qyswaqlj`; AI-Assist composer JSBlock `88cgkm99l1z`; AI-Activity **List** `79jtpckq6rw` + JSField `8fggwclmle3`; Queue-by-Status donut JSBlock `mfz6wb8bcqd`; Top-Vendors bars JSBlock `xwwct4h0g97`. Card click → `openView('bczv6qvz3l7')` (reuses the Documents-page drawer with 3 sub-tables).
- **6 list pages** (Filter + Add + Table + View drawer): Documents `qu0mvrjbi2e` (drawer has lineItems/extractedFields/checks sub-tables), Vendors `dkdlwhm3kb1`, AI Activity `99xrtqbd752`, Validation Checks `nasuak4x8rt`, Line Items `yvkmm1e47vd`, Extracted Fields `bhk1kqnmf8e`.

### ③ Self-Score: 9/10

### ④ Comparison vs prototype
- **Match:** layout is near-1:1 — KPI strip, left ranked-document list, **right column stacks AI-Assist over AI-Activity** (achieved by stacking two blocks in one grid column), and the donut+bars chart row. Card anatomy (status-color conf-bar, gradient vendor tile, status pill, rose AI-score badge, confidence bar, amount/PO), pill placement, rose composer, donut colors, and vendor bars all reproduce the prototype. Verified interactions: clicking a card opens the rich native drawer (grouped fields + Line Items sub-table); the **Flagged** pill filters the list 14→2 with the active pill highlighted.
- **Live vs mock numbers differ (correct behavior, not fudged):** Auto-Cleared shows 50% (7/14) vs prototype's mock 68%; Needs Review 3 vs 5; Spend $1.48M (sum of vendor cycle_spend) vs $1.84M.
- **Minor cosmetic gaps:** no "LIVE" badge / "Sorted by AI priority score" sub-line on the activity/list headers (NocoBase header chrome); the drawer's System group shows a raw `vendorId`.

### ⑤ Gotchas hit
- `data-modeling collections apply` with a large `--fields` array **silently dropped 3 fields** (doc_no/status/lineItems) — re-applied them individually. `collections fields list` paginates to 20 (use `collections get --appends fields`).
- m2o `reverseField` **needs its own `target`** or 500s. Dynamic `<coll>:create`/`:update` aren't `nb api` commands even after `nb env update` → seed + `flowModels:save` via raw curl with the config token.
- Child-page `document.doc_no` column still pulls the parent documents popup → needs `defaults.collections.ai82_documents.fieldGroups`; relation paths are ineligible for `defau
